overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing a character in 18th-century attire exploring an opulent French palace interior. The character moves through wood-paneled chambers, white marble halls with fallen bodies, and ascends a grand staircase before navigating corridors and descending to a lower level.

events.description: character approaches and passes through doorway from wood-paneled room to adjacent chamber

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an ornate study with wood paneling and red carpets, heading toward an open doorway

entered.detail: dark ornate wood paneling with gold trim covering the walls
red carpet with gold trim running through the center of the room
large wooden desk with papers and books scattered on top
white marble bust on pedestal against the wall
loose papers strewn across the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an opulent wood-paneled study featuring dark wooden walls, a red carpet runner, and scattered papers on the floor. A large wooden desk and marble bust are visible as the character approaches a doorway leading to the next room.

scene_state.functional_zone: white marble hall with grand staircase and fallen bodies

events.description: exits wood-paneled room into bright white marble hall with tall columns
begins ascending grand staircase with red carpet runner

agents.ego_description: walking through a white marble hall littered with bodies, then climbing a grand red-carpeted staircase

notable_agents.action: fallen bodies of guards lying on the marble floor and stairs

entered.detail: tall fluted white marble columns supporting the ceiling
multiple fallen guards in blue uniforms lying on the floor
sweeping bifurcated staircase with white marble steps
large ornate crystal chandelier hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright white marble hall with tall columns, where several bodies lie scattered on the floor. The character then ascends a grand bifurcated staircase covered with a red carpet, passing more fallen guards as crystal chandeliers hang overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor white corridors transitioning to dark red chamber

events.description: enters darker room with red walls and reduced natural light
exits dark red room back into wood-paneled corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through white marble corridors lined with paintings, entering a dark red-walled room with large oil paintings, then exiting to wood-paneled areas

entered.detail: large framed classical oil painting on the wall
walls covered in dark red fabric or paint with ornate trim
heavy red velvet curtains framing the windows

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character moves through white marble corridors with oil paintings, then enters a dimly lit chamber with dark red walls and large classical paintings. The character passes through this room and exits back into a wood-paneled corridor with herringbone flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled rooms transitioning to white marble lower hall

events.description: begins descending secondary staircase with white marble steps
exits staircase into large white hall with checkered marble floor

agents.ego_description: walking through wood-paneled rooms, then descending a white marble staircase to a lower level with checkered flooring

entered.detail: white marble staircase with ornate railing descending to lower floor
black and white checkered marble tile flooring
wooden bench with red cushion against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through more wood-paneled chambers with red carpets and scattered papers, then descends a white marble staircase with ornate railings. Upon reaching the bottom, the character enters a spacious white hall with checkered marble flooring and tall columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with rows of chairs

events.description: enters long corridor lined with rows of wooden chairs

agents.ego_description: walking down a long corridor with checkered floors, passing rows of wooden chairs and wall sconces

entered.detail: rows of wooden chairs with red cushions arranged along the corridor
ornate wall-mounted candle sconces providing light
large potted plant in decorative urn

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, narrow corridor with checkered marble flooring, passing rows of wooden chairs arranged against the right wall. Wall sconces and potted plants line the left side as the character approaches a distant doorway at the end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an opulent French palace, transitioning from dark, intimate studies to grand marble halls and back through ornate corridors. It begins in a wood-paneled study with a red carpet and scattered papers, moving through a doorway that opens into a bright white marble hall filled with tall columns and fallen bodies. As the character ascends a grand bifurcated staircase under crystal chandeliers, the scene shifts through white corridors and a dimly lit red chamber before returning to wood-paneled rooms with herringbone flooring. The camera then follows a descent down an ornate marble staircase into a spacious hall with checkered flooring, finally proceeding down a long, narrow corridor lined with wooden chairs and wall sconces toward a distant doorway.
